openFindings.title: Strict packet validation currently fails despite completion status
evidence: checklist.md:75 marks strict validation as passed
implementation-summary.md:103 records the strict validation command as PASS
implementation-summary.md:16 has continuity last_updated_at 2026-04-13T00:00:00Z
graph-metadata.json:209 has derived.last_save_at 2026-04-21T13:00:00Z
live validation returned RESULT: FAILED (strict) with CONTINUITY_FRESHNESS warning
openFindings.impact: The packet cannot honestly be treated as complete or release-ready under its own Level 2 verification contract.
openFindings.remediation: Refresh or intentionally repair _memory.continuity timestamps, rerun strict validation, and update checklist/summary evidence from the new output.

openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still points at the old 010 phase while packet identity is 001
evidence: description.json:2 records the current specFolder under 001-search-and-routing-tuning
description.json:17-23 records parentChain with 010-search-and-routing-tuning
graph-metadata.json:3-5 records packet_id and parent_id under 001-search-and-routing-tuning
openFindings.impact: Memory/search surfaces can route this packet through a stale parent chain even though graph metadata now points at the renumbered path.
openFindings.remediation: Regenerate description.json after the final renumbering so parentChain agrees with specFolder, graph-metadata parent_id, and migration.new_spec_folder.

openFindings.title: Graph README key-files table is split by the new derivation section
evidence: .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/graph/README.md:82-89 opens the Key Files table
.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/graph/README.md:91-96 inserts a new heading and bullets
.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/graph/README.md:97-100 resumes table rows without a header
openFindings.impact: The operator-facing runtime reference is harder to read and renders graph-signals/temporal/usage rows as orphaned table fragments.
openFindings.remediation: Move the derivation highlight section after the complete Key Files table or split the remaining rows into a second valid table.

openFindings.title: Completion evidence overstates verification by marking failed strict validation as PASS
evidence: plan.md:68-72 marks all acceptance criteria and tests as complete
checklist.md:75 marks CHK-021 [P0] strict packet validation passes
implementation-summary.md:100-103 records strict validation as PASS
live strict validation returned exit code 2 and RESULT: FAILED (strict)
openFindings.impact: Future operators may trust stale evidence and skip the repair needed to make the packet valid again after graph metadata refresh.
openFindings.remediation: Replace stale PASS evidence with current command output and leave the item unchecked until strict validation exits successfully.

openFindings.title: Verification-only scan surfaces are claimed but not traceable from the spec scope
evidence: spec.md:91-101 lists requested files to change without ARCHITECTURE.md or mcp_server/lib/config/README.md
checklist.md:55 cites ARCHITECTURE.md and mcp_server/lib/config/README.md as verification-only surfaces
implementation-summary.md:58-59 says those files were in the requested scan set
graph-metadata.json:43-59 includes both files in derived.key_files
openFindings.impact: The packet says every requested surface was scanned, but two named verification-only surfaces are not anchored in the normative scope table.
openFindings.remediation: Add a scoped 'verification-only surfaces' list to spec.md or remove the untraceable claim from closeout docs and graph metadata after regeneration.

openFindings.title: The review input named decision-record.md, but the packet has no decision-record artifact
evidence: target folder file listing contains spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, implementation-summary.md, description.json, and graph-metadata.json
implementation-summary.md:85-92 stores decisions inline instead of in decision-record.md
openFindings.impact: This is acceptable for a Level 2 packet, but external review instructions that expect decision-record.md cannot be satisfied from disk.
openFindings.remediation: Either document that Level 2 decisions live in implementation-summary.md or add a lightweight decision-record.md if this packet is promoted to Level 3.

openFindings.title: Derived entities include title-fragment noise
evidence: graph-metadata.json:164-174 contains entities named Problem Statement The and Purpose Make
graph-metadata.json:194-204 contains entities named Overview The and Pattern Other
openFindings.impact: The packet demonstrates that entity deduplication is working, but noisy proper-noun fragments still reduce graph/search quality.
openFindings.remediation: Tighten entity extraction filters or document that entity sanitization is outside this packet's deduplication guarantee.

openFindings.title: Backfill dry-run flags a false relationship hint from the phase dependency table header
evidence: plan.md:160 contains the table header Depends On
dry-run backfill output returned reviewFlags=[prose_relationship_hints]
openFindings.impact: The refreshed graph metadata path can create review noise for ordinary plan template wording.
openFindings.remediation: Narrow collectReviewFlags relationship detection so table headers like 'Depends On' do not trigger prose relationship hints by themselves.
